loop.observation: The native config plan is compiled into Go code and reader docs, but the IR file itself was still counted as internal loop debt.
loop.hypothesis: Declaring the native-config-plan loop makes provider file-plan drift observable at the executable IR boundary.
loop.execute: Run riidogen/workspace native config evidence to verify code generation, manifest materialization docs, provider hook mappings, and workdir tests.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails when generated Go, provider file plans, hook mappings, source anchors, generated docs, or workflow wiring drift.
loop.retrospective: Provider native config behavior stays generated from IR rather than being redefined in hand-written code or prose.
